title: Ripples of the Past: Pearl Jam Addon
description: An Addon that adds Pearl Jam to Ripples of the Past.
body:
# A Ripples of the Past addon that adds Pearl Jam.
A Minecraft mod that adds a Pearl Jam to [Ripples of the Past](https://modrinth.com/mod/ripples-of-the-past/versions) obtainable through Stand Arrow 
## Abilities
### Left Click Hotbar:
- Inject Food
- Inject Poison into Food
### Right Click Hotbar:
- Unject Food
- Hand Toggle
- Secret By Chef
### IMPORTANT:
- If you inject poison into food, the food will have buffs from food (your poison effects + food effects, e.g. golden apple + poison food => bad effect + good effect).
